gaps.description: All three vision backends (AgenticStore/OPFS/NodeFs) implemented with unified StorageBackend interface
Environment abstraction — agents operate without knowing underlying backend
createBackend() auto-selects Node → SQLite → OPFS → IndexedDB → Memory based on runtime environment
Shell-style agent tools (shell_cat, shell_head, shell_tail, shell_find, shell_delete, shell_tree) provided via shellFsTools
AgenticStoreBackend stat() tracks mtime on write — correct modification time tracking for key-value store abstraction
OPFSBackend stat() correctly detects directories via getDirHandle() probe — returns isDirectory: true for directory paths
SQLiteBackend included in createBackend() auto-selection — auto-detected via better-sqlite3 dynamic import in Node.js
batchGet/batchSet/scanStream exposed as AgenticFileSystem public methods and wired into executeTool() as agent tools
